message:
Make liburing Linux-only in Nix build

liburing is not available on Darwin, so move it from unconditional
propagatedBuildInputs to a Linux-only conditional. This fixes the
aarch64-darwin Nix build failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -271,7 +271,6 @@ let
               folly
               double-conversion
               libevent
-              liburing
               libsodium
               snappy
               google-cloud-cpp-tenzir
@@ -288,7 +287,10 @@ let
               yaml-cpp
               xxHash
             ]
-            ++ lib.optionals (!isStatic) [
+            ++ lib.optionals stdenv.isLinux [
+              liburing
+            ]
+          ++ lib.optionals (!isStatic) [
               arrow-adbc-cpp
             ];
